meaning: 巴统[前苏联外高加索黑海东岸港市]
examples: I cheerlessly ate the bread that had come with it, before continuing on my way to Batumi.
The USS McFaul sailed into Batumi Sunday loaded with blankets, bottled water, milk, baby food, diapers and hygiene kits.
Prokudin-Gorskii in suit and hat, seated on rock beside the Karolitskhali River, in the Caucasus Mountains near the seaport of Batumi on the eastern coast of the Black sea.
Mr Varshalomidze talks wistfully of times before the Russian revolution, when Batumi had 18 foreign consulates.
Incidentally, Batumi is also the site of a preliminary round of talks between Georgia and the European Union starting today.
